Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong2_sovereignqi
Esoterica.Desc: Ignite the sovereign qi current within. Energy overflows, fatigue ceases to exist, and the body never tires.
Esoterica.EffectDesc: [size=10][color=#D06508]Massively increases Stamina Conversion Rate and Energy.\nVirtually eliminates Fatigue.\nBoosts Max Qi.[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong2_sovereignstrike
Esoterica.Desc: Channel sovereign power into every strike. Max Qi becomes virtually infinite and Qi absorption transcends all limits.
Esoterica.EffectDesc: [size=10][color=#D06508]Massively increases Max Qi.\nGreatly increases Qi Absorption Speed.[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong2_sovereignbody
Esoterica.Desc: Temper the body with sovereign power. All five elements attune perfectly. HP becomes godlike. Qi recovery becomes instantaneous.
Esoterica.EffectDesc: [size=10][color=#D06508]Boosts all Five Elements massively.\nMassively increases Qi Absorption Speed.\nGreatly increases HP.[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong2_sovereigncauldron
Esoterica.Desc: Expand the Inner Cauldron with sovereign energy. The sovereign's Qi reserves are truly infinite — no ceiling can contain this power.
Esoterica.EffectDesc: [size=10][color=#D06508]Inner Cauldron becomes virtually infinite.\nMassively increases Max Qi.[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong2_sovereignpotential
Esoterica.Desc: Unlock the sovereign's infinite potential. Cultivation speed reaches an incomprehensible level. Heaven's condemnation is irrelevant.
Esoterica.EffectDesc: [size=10][color=#D06508]Boosts all Five Elements.\nMaximizes Potential.\nMassively increases Cultivation Speed.[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong2_sovereignmantra
Esoterica.Desc: Meditate on the sovereign dao, accelerating cultivation beyond all mortal understanding. Spell power rises to devastating levels.

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong2_sovereignpill
Esoterica.Desc: A pill forged from condensed sovereign Qi. Fills the Inner Cauldron effortlessly without any side effects.
Esoterica.EffectDesc: [size=10][color=#D06508]Acquire the following elixir recipe: \nQi Compression Pill[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong2_sovereignshield
Esoterica.Desc: Envelop the body in an impenetrable sovereign barrier. Nothing can breach the shield of a sect sovereign.
Esoterica.EffectDesc:
[size=10][color=#D06508]Massively increases Qi Shield effectiveness.
Massively increases Defense.
Massively increases Recovery.
Pain is meaningless.[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong2_sovereigntempest
Esoterica.Desc: Create an eternal sovereign storm in your core. The tempest devours enemy power and feeds it back as unstoppable attack.
Esoterica.EffectDesc:
[size=10][color=#D06508]Massively increases Max Qi.
Massively increases Attack.
Massively increases Spell Power.
Massively increases HP.[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong2_sovereignstep
Esoterica.Desc: Move with the authority of a sovereign — crossing vast distances in an instant, impossible to pin down.
Esoterica.EffectDesc: [size=10][color=#D06508]Massively increases Movement and Flying Speed.\nGreatly increases Dodge Rate.[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong2_sectpill
Esoterica.Desc: Pills forged from the distilled power of fallen sects. Grant total immunity to all five elements.
Esoterica.EffectDesc:
[size=10][color=#D06508]Acquire the following elixir recipes: 
Water Restraining Pill
Fire Restraining Pill
Metal Restraining Pill
Wood Restraining Pill
Earth Restraining Pill[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong2_sectbreaker
Esoterica.Desc: Harness the sovereign's absolute authority over all cultivators. Your Qi and defenses transcend divine limits. Sects crumble at your approach.
Esoterica.EffectDesc: [size=10][color=#D06508]Massively increases Max Qi and Shield.\nMassively increases Defense and HP.\nGreatly extends Lifespan.[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong2_sovereignincantation
Esoterica.Desc: Master the sovereign's instantaneous incantation. Spells are cast before enemies can react, cost nothing, and obliterate all in their path.
Esoterica.EffectDesc:
[size=10][color=#D06508]Boosts all Five Elements.
Spell Cooldown reduced to near zero.
Spell Cost reduced to zero.
Massively increases Spell Power.[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong2_sectobliteration
Esoterica.Desc: Master the sovereign's ultimate offensive art. Your attacks do not merely wound — they erase. Every enemy struck ceases to exist.
Esoterica.EffectDesc: [size=10][color=#D06508]Massively increases Spell Power and Attack.\nGuaranteed Critical Hits.\nMassively increases Critical Damage.[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong2_sovereignartifact
Esoterica.Desc: Recorded Legacy Artifact: Heaven-Rending Sword crafting recipe. This supreme blade is the sovereign's greatest weapon.
Esoterica.EffectDesc: [size=10][color=#D06508]Acquire the crafting method of Legacy Artifact: \nHeaven-Rending Sword[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong2_sectdestroyeresoterica
Esoterica.Desc: Recorded Legacy Artifact: Sect-Destroyer Talisman crafting recipe. The ultimate sect-annihilating talisman.
Esoterica.EffectDesc: [size=10][color=#D06508]Acquire the crafting method of Legacy Artifact: \nSect-Destroyer Talisman[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong2_sectsovereign
Esoterica.Desc: Become the sovereign of all sects. Your body, Qi, and spirit transcend all limits. Every cultivator in the realm bows before your sovereign pressure.
Esoterica.EffectDesc:
[size=10][color=#D06508]Boosts all Five Elements to the maximum.
HP, Defense, Attack become absolute.
Max Qi becomes infinite.
Greatly extends Lifespan.[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong2_sovereignannihilation
Esoterica.Desc: Unleash the sovereign's full destructive will. Everything touched by this power is erased from existence — sects, armies, mountains alike.
Esoterica.EffectDesc:
[size=10][color=#D06508]Spell Power reaches infinity.
Guaranteed Critical Hits with devastating damage.
Dodge becomes absolute.
Pain is completely meaningless.[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong2_eternalsovereign
Esoterica.Desc: Ascend beyond heaven and earth as the Eternal Sect Sovereign — omnipotent ruler of all cultivators, all sects, all creation. No one in heaven, earth, or the void can challenge your authority.
Esoterica.EffectDesc:
[size=10][color=#D06508]ALL stats become INFINITE.
All Five Elements maximized.
Zero Spell cost and cooldown.
Immortal Lifespan.
Absolute Dodge and Critical.
No Fatigue. No limits. No equal.[/color][/size]
